author: lOrm
content: Fixed in worktree: src/skills.rs::load_skills now consults a process-wide LazyLock<RwLock<Option<SkillsCache>>> keyed on (path, Option<SystemTime>) tuples for each scanned dir (project + user). Fast path takes a read lock and clones cached Vec on mtime match; slow path rescans under a write lock and re-checks (thundering-herd protection). Added invalidate_cache() for editor watchers. parse_skill_file now logs tracing::warn! with skill_path + error message on both IO read failure and serde_yaml frontmatter parse failure (previously silent None). Added 4 tests: parse_skill_file_returns_none_on_bad_yaml, load_skills_uncached_dedupes_project_first, current_mtimes_changes_when_dir_mtime_changes, load_skills_populates_and_reuses_cache. All pass; clippy clean.
